detector_graph.coordinate_rule: row=index%height,column=index//height; both centered and divided by one common pixel scale
detector_graph.projection_frame_source: mean Ruvecs and Rvvecs per view with numerical Gram-Schmidt

known_limitation.camera_correlated_noise_profile: legacy development generator reshaped quantile-selected rays as a square proxy; detector graph features use recovered coordinates, but this opened synthetic noise profile is not measured detector covariance
known_limitation.interpretation: mechanism screening only; a positive result still requires graph-correlated or measured flow-off covariance and a sealed repeat

small_set_encoder_authorized_only_if: combined strict route passes inherited development field gate
combined strict route beats pooled strict on validation and calibration
calibration front mean and p10 safety audit pass
leave-one-family and leave-one-noise do not reverse the gain
